titleStmt.title: SII 23.439: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 439. (A.R. No. 439 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Lakshmīnārāyaṇa temple—on the west wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 5: 1016-17 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tirumaṉṉivaḷara etc., which stops with the mention of Maṇṇaikkaḍakkam. This registers the sale of some land by the sabhā of three places viz. Arikēsarinallūr. Arapadaśēkaramaṅgalam and Mandaragauravamaṅgalam to Śōlai Appi of Perumaṅgalam for 15 kāśu, (for his donating the same) for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Durgā-Paramēśvari. The land is said to have belonged to them in common. Aḷanāḍu is said to be a division of Rājarājamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunila maṭan=taiyum śrītaṉiccelviyum poṟ ceyappāvaiyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭintuvaru Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭu ntuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar va
ṉavāciyum cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum māpperu n=taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripan rāyiṉa śrīrājentracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu śrī
rājarājamaṇṭalattu Aḻanāṭṭu brahmadeyam Arikecarinallūr sabhaiyomum Arapatacekaramaṅkalattu sabhaiyomum mandragorava maṅkalattu sabhaiyomum nammūr tūṟkāparameśvariyār śrīvācal
kopurattuk kūṭṭakkuṟaiviṉṟik kūṭiyiruntu Iññāṭṭu perumaṅkalattu colliyāṉa colaiappi nammūr tuṟkāparameśvariyārkku tiru non=tāviḷakkukku viṟṟukkuṭutta bhūmiāvatu Ivvarike
carinallūr Oḷappūḻakkālaṉ milakāl (?) sabhaipotuvāyk kiṭan=ta kecavavayakkal taṭi Oṉṟu Aḷavupaṭi nilaṉ mākāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭut tom Ivvūrkaḷil sabhaiyom Ippūmiykku vilaidravyamumi
ṟaiydravyamum Āka koṇṭa kācu 10 5 patiṉṉaiñcu Ikkācu patiṉṉaiñcum koṇṭu Ippūmi
sabhaiyom Ippūmiye koṇṭu Oru non=tāviḷakku
dvandrādiccavalam muṭṭāmal Erippatākavum .
Digital edition of SII 23.439 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
